Race: ALL

WT: 0.2 Size: SMALL

Quest Name
Bug Collection

Why in Glooming Deep???
QuoteReply
# May 23 2007 at 2:24 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592275296314
52 posts
Wierd you cannot use it in Glooming deep because it must be applied to your blade and you as a rogue do not get that ability till 20???
▲ Page top
Vendor
QuoteReply
# Aug 27 2006 at 2:07 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592269062395
7 posts
This can also be found in the Mines of Gloomingdeep. It's a random drop from the chest behing Queen Gloomfang. Or you can buy it from the merchant in the mines for just over 1pp.
▲ Page top
Spiders in Toxx
QuoteReply
# Aug 03 2004 at 1:41 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592264327072
345 posts
Took my 3 hours to finally get one from a large widow in Toxx and as far as I noticed there are only 2(!) spawning spots for the LW - definitely no item one can farm...
▲ Page top
LDoN
QuoteReply
# Feb 22 2004 at 7:24 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591766929078
132 posts
These also drop off the spiders in LDoN (Butcher Block theme) at lvl 25-30ish adventures (aint seen it drop in higher ones yet, so might only be in the lower ones).

# Feb 21 2002 at 8:53 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592758960305
53 posts
The great thing about this is the fact it is not LORE, keep a few with you, im sure strong poison i worth it, just the poison given by asps kick ars, and this is STRONG, no doubt it is a great item, i plan on getting one myself

Anonymous
This should be a pretty good thing for a rouge who doesnt wanna make poison plus its pretty good dmg (been hit with strong poison before )
good for when u need to do dmg fast
